summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: Ayar Labs (San Jose) closed a $500M Series E, while AI plays dominated with major rounds for Nexthop AI, Rhoda AI, and Mind Robotics across Santa Clara and Palo Alto. SiFive's $400M Series G and Eridu's $200M-plus Series A signal strong investor appetite for semiconductors and infrastructure. Most local companies are hiring steadily, though a handful are tightening belts.
